include.name: Verify success transaction with ECOM token with all mandatory and optional fields in PTC
Verify success transaction with ECOM token for MDR+PCF merchant
Verify failure transaction with ECOM token with all mandatory and optional fields in PTC
Verify failure transaction with ECOM token with all mandatory and optional fields in PTC for MDR+PCF merchant
Verify that PTC API fails for merchant not having token support preference for transaction with ECOM token
Verify success transaction with CC ECOM token with only mandatory fields in PTC
Verify that transaction with prepaid card ECOM token should fail
Verify that transaction with prepaid card ECOM token should fail for MDR+PCF merchant
Verify the transaction with corporate card ECOM token is successful
Verify the transaction with corporate card ECOM token is successful for MDR+PCF merchant
Verify that PTC API fails with ECOM token when mandatory parameter ecomtoken is missing
Verify that PTC API fails with ECOM token when mandatory parameter expiryMonth is missing
Verify that PTC API fails with ECOM token when mandatory parameter expiryYear is missing
Verify that PTC API fails with ECOM token when mandatory parameter authenticationValue is missing
Verify that in case of mismatch of paymentMode and issuingBank between merchant and our DB, our DB credentials are picked
Verify that the PTC API fails when expiryMonth field has value more than 12
Verify that the PTC API fails when expiryMonth field has only single digit value
Verify transaction with VISA CC ECOM token
Verify that the PTC API fails when expiryYear is of past
Verify that the PTC API fails when ECOM token digits are less than 16
Verify transaction should fail when CC ECOM token transaction is initiated when CC acquiring is not present on MID
Verify transaction should fail for prepaid ECOM token transaction is initiated when Prepaid acquiring is not present on MID
Verify transaction should fail for corporate ECOM token transaction is initiated when Corporate acquiring is not present on MID
Verify successful refund of ECOM token transaction
Verify that the PTC API fails when EMI transaction is initiated with ECOM token
Verify that transaction does not fail at theia end when ECOM token passed has bank as null in get token API
Verify that corporate card transaction does not fail at theia end when ECOM token passed has bank as null in get token API
